text.zh: 我们第一次见面那天，你记得最清楚的细节是什么？
text.en: What detail do you remember most clearly from the day we first met?

text.zh: 你第一次觉得“我们会有故事”是什么时候？
text.en: When did you first feel "we'll have a story"?

text.zh: 我们共同度过的最普通、却让你很安心的一天是哪天？
text.en: Which of our most ordinary days made you feel most at ease?

text.zh: 你第一次向朋友提起我时，是怎么形容我的？
text.en: How did you describe me the first time you mentioned me to a friend?

text.zh: 我们之间第一次让你笑出声的瞬间是什么？
text.en: What was the first moment between us that made you laugh out loud?

text.zh: 你还记得我们第一次牵手时的心情吗？
text.en: Do you remember how you felt when we first held hands?

text.zh: 我们一起做过最傻的事是哪件？
text.en: What's the silliest thing we've done together?

text.zh: 你想象中我们五年后的一个普通早晨是什么样的？
text.en: What does an ordinary morning five years from now look like to you?

text.zh: 如果我们明年能一起学一件新事物，你想学什么？
text.en: If we could learn something new together next year, what would it be?

text.zh: 你最想和我一起去的旅行目的地是哪里？为什么？
text.en: Where do you most want to travel with me, and why?

text.zh: 你希望我们未来的家里，一定不能少的一样东西是什么？
text.en: What's one thing our future home must absolutely have?

text.zh: 十年后你希望我们还在坚持的一个共同习惯是什么？
text.en: What shared habit do you hope we're still keeping ten years from now?

text.zh: 你想和我一起完成的一个“人生清单”项目是什么？
text.en: What's one bucket-list item you want to complete with me?

text.zh: 你想象中我们老去后最常一起做的事是什么？
text.en: What do you imagine we'll do most often together when we're old?

text.zh: 你最喜欢我哪个瞬间的小表情？
text.en: Which little expression of mine do you like most?

text.zh: 我做的哪件小事，会让你突然觉得被爱着？
text.en: What small thing I do makes you suddenly feel loved?

text.zh: 你觉得我们之间最浪漫的一个日常瞬间是什么？
text.en: What's the most romantic everyday moment between us?

text.zh: 你最喜欢我用什么方式说“我爱你”？
text.en: What's your favorite way I say "I love you"?

text.zh: 如果用一种气味形容我们之间的感觉，会是什么？
text.en: If our relationship were a scent, what would it be?

text.zh: 你第一次想吻我时，心里在想什么？
text.en: What were you thinking the first time you wanted to kiss me?

text.zh: 我身上哪一点，最让你心动？
text.en: What about me makes your heart skip?

text.zh: 你觉得一段关系里最重要的三样东西是什么？
text.en: What are the three most important things in a relationship to you?

text.zh: 你怎么看“个人空间”在我们关系里的位置？
text.en: How do you see personal space fitting into our relationship?

text.zh: 对你来说，“安全感”主要由什么构成？
text.en: For you, what mainly makes up "a sense of security"?

text.zh: 你认为金钱在一段关系里应该扮演什么角色？
text.en: What role do you think money should play in a relationship?

text.zh: 你更看重“相似”还是“互补”？
text.en: Do you value "similarity" or "complementarity" more?

text.zh: 你认为诚实和体贴冲突时，应该先选哪个？
text.en: When honesty and consideration conflict, which comes first?

text.zh: 你怎么定义“一段好的感情”？
text.en: How do you define "a good relationship"?

text.zh: 这一年里，你觉得自己最大的一个变化是什么？
text.en: What's the biggest change in yourself this past year?

text.zh: 你最想改掉的一个小习惯是什么？
text.en: What small habit do you most want to change?

text.zh: 你最近在为自己努力的一件事是什么？
text.en: What's something you're currently working hard on for yourself?

text.zh: 你希望自己一年后在哪方面变得更好？
text.en: In what area do you hope to be better a year from now?

text.zh: 你最近学到的一件关于自己的事是什么？
text.en: What's something you've recently learned about yourself?

text.zh: 你最欣赏自己身上的哪一点？
text.en: What do you most appreciate about yourself?

text.zh: 你有没有一个一直想做却还没做的事？
text.en: Is there something you've always wanted to do but haven't yet?

text.zh: 如果我们俩是一部电影的主角，会是什么类型？
text.en: If we were leads in a movie, what genre would it be?

text.zh: 你觉得我们俩谁更可能在丧尸危机里活到最后？
text.en: Who between us would survive a zombie apocalypse?

text.zh: 如果给我们俩起个双人组合的名字，你会叫什么？
text.en: What would you name our duo?

text.zh: 你最想和我一起玩的一个游戏是什么？
text.en: What game do you most want to play with me?

text.zh: 如果我们互换身体一天，你第一件事会做什么？
text.en: If we swapped bodies for a day, what's the first thing you'd do?

text.zh: 你觉得我像哪种动物？为什么？
text.en: What animal do I remind you of, and why?

text.zh: 我们之间最像“梗”的一句话是什么？
text.en: What's our most meme-like phrase between us?

text.zh: 我们之间哪次争吵之后，反而让你更确定这段感情？
text.en: After which of our arguments did you feel more certain about us?

text.zh: 你有没有哪个瞬间，突然很庆幸我们没有错过彼此？
text.en: Was there a moment you suddenly felt glad we didn't miss each other?

text.zh: 我们一起经历过的最难的时刻，你当时是怎么熬过来的？
text.en: How did you get through the hardest time we've shared?

text.zh: 你第一次为我担心，是因为什么？
text.en: What made you worry about me for the first time?

text.zh: 我们之间有没有一个没说出口、但其实很重要的时刻？
text.en: Is there an unspoken but important moment between us?

text.zh: 你记得我第一次为你哭是什么时候吗？
text.en: Do you remember when I first cried for you?

text.zh: 我们共同的一个秘密回忆，你最珍惜哪个？
text.en: Which of our secret shared memories do you cherish most?

text.zh: 如果未来有一天我们对彼此失望了，你希望怎么被提醒？
text.en: If one day we disappoint each other, how would you want to be reminded?

text.zh: 你希望我们在对方面前，可以脆弱到什么程度？
text.en: How vulnerable do you hope we can be with each other?

text.zh: 你想象中我们最可能因为什么而争吵？
text.en: What do you imagine we'd most likely argue about?

text.zh: 如果我们要共同抚养一个生命（孩子或宠物），你最在意什么？
text.en: If we raised a life together, what would you care about most?

text.zh: 你希望十年后我们如何处理彼此的缺点？
text.en: How do you hope we'll handle each other's flaws in ten years?

text.zh: 你希望我们之间永远保留的一种“仪式感”是什么？
text.en: What ritual do you hope we always keep?

text.zh: 你害怕我们未来的什么？又期待什么？
text.en: What about our future scares you, and what excites you?

text.zh: 你觉得我们之间的浪漫，缺了什么？
text.en: What's missing from the romance between us?

text.zh: 你希望我更经常为你做的一件事是什么？
text.en: What's one thing you wish I did for you more often?

text.zh: 你最想和我重新经历一次的一个亲密瞬间是什么？
text.en: Which intimate moment do you most want to relive with me?

text.zh: 你有没有一种只对我才会有的柔软？
text.en: Do you have a softness that's only for me?

text.zh: 你觉得我们之间的身体语言里，哪一种最让你安心？
text.en: Which piece of our body language makes you feel most safe?

text.zh: 你希望我怎样在别人面前提起你？
text.en: How do you want me to mention you in front of others?

text.zh: 你心中属于我们俩的“浪漫定义”是什么？
text.en: What's your personal "definition of romance" for us?

text.zh: 我们价值观里最大的不同，你怎么看？
text.en: How do you view our biggest value difference?

text.zh: 如果我们意见相左，你最希望我怎么做？
text.en: When we disagree, what do you most want me to do?

text.zh: 你能接受的底线和不能接受的底线，分别是什么？
text.en: What are your acceptable and unacceptable lines?

text.zh: 你怎么看待我们各自的原生家庭对未来关系的影响？
text.en: How do you see our families of origin affecting our future?

text.zh: 你认为“忠诚”对我们而言意味着什么？
text.en: What does "loyalty" mean to us?

text.zh: 你希望我们在财务上如何彼此坦诚？
text.en: How honest do you hope we are about finances?

text.zh: 你怎么处理“我对你失望”和“你对自己失望”的差别？
text.en: How do you handle the difference between "I'm disappointed in you" and "in myself"?

text.zh: 你觉得认识我之后，自己最大的成长是什么？
text.en: What's your biggest growth since knowing me?

text.zh: 你希望我能陪你一起面对的一个困难是什么？
text.en: What's one difficulty you hope I'll face alongside you?

text.zh: 你有没有一段过去的伤，希望我帮你一起疗愈？
text.en: Is there an old wound you hope I'll help heal?

text.zh: 你希望我能在哪方面给你更多的支持？
text.en: In what area do you hope I'll support you more?

text.zh: 你最近一次为自己骄傲，是因为什么？
text.en: What recently made you proud of yourself?

text.zh: 你害怕我哪一点会阻碍你的成长？
text.en: What about me do you fear might hinder your growth?

text.zh: 你希望我们如何成为彼此“更好的版本”？
text.en: How do you hope we make each other better?

text.zh: 如果我们办一场只属于两人的派对，会是什么样？
text.en: If we threw a party just for two, what would it be like?

text.zh: 你最想和我一起尝试却一直没敢做的事是什么？
text.en: What's something you want to try with me but haven't dared?

text.zh: 如果我们私奔一周，你会选哪里？
text.en: If we ran away together for a week, where would you go?

text.zh: 你觉得我们俩最像哪对影视CP？
text.en: Which on-screen couple are we most like?

text.zh: 你想和我一起完成的一个疯狂挑战是什么？
text.en: What crazy challenge do you want to complete with me?

text.zh: 如果给我们俩拍纪录片，标题会是什么？
text.en: If there were a documentary about us, what would it be titled?

text.zh: 你想和我一起创造的一个“只有我们懂的”传统是什么？
text.en: What "only-we-understand" tradition do you want to create with me?

text.zh: 你人生中哪段经历，让你变成了现在爱我的样子？
text.en: Which life experience made you the person who can love me now?

text.zh: 你有没有一个从未告诉过任何人的回忆，愿意现在告诉我吗？
text.en: Is there a memory you've never told anyone, that you'd share now?

text.zh: 你童年里最深的伤口是什么？它如何影响了你爱人的方式？
text.en: What's your deepest childhood wound, and how has it shaped how you love?

text.zh: 你曾经失去过什么，让你更懂得珍惜我？
text.en: What have you lost that made you cherish me more?

text.zh: 你记忆里最孤独的一刻是什么？那时你希望谁在身边？
text.en: What was your loneliest moment, and who did you wish was there?

text.zh: 你有没有一个遗憾，至今仍影响着你？
text.en: Is there a regret that still affects you?

text.zh: 你觉得自己最像父母的哪一面？这让你害怕还是安心？
text.en: Which side of your parents are you most like - does that scare or comfort you?

text.zh: 如果有一天我们不再相爱，你希望我们如何体面地告别？
text.en: If one day we stop loving each other, how would you want us to part gracefully?

text.zh: 你希望我如何陪你面对衰老和死亡？
text.en: How do you want me to face aging and death alongside you?

text.zh: 你理想中“和彼此走到最后”是什么样子？
text.en: What does "going all the way with each other" look like to you?

text.zh: 你愿意为我放弃什么？又有什么是绝不愿放弃的？
text.en: What would you give up for me, and what never?

text.zh: 你希望我们留给这个世界的，是什么？
text.en: What do you hope we leave to this world?

text.zh: 如果只剩一年，你最想和我完成什么？
text.en: If we had one year left, what would you most want to complete with me?

text.zh: 你害怕先离开，还是被留下？
text.en: Do you fear leaving first, or being left behind?

text.zh: 你爱我哪一点，是你从未对任何人有过的？
text.en: What do you love about me that you've never felt for anyone?

text.zh: 你愿意让我看见你最不堪的样子吗？为什么？
text.en: Will you let me see you at your worst? Why?

text.zh: 你心中“被完全爱着”的感觉，是什么？
text.en: What does "being completely loved" feel like to you?

text.zh: 你觉得我们的爱，有没有改变过你灵魂的形状？
text.en: Has our love ever reshaped your soul?

text.zh: 你希望我如何在你最脆弱时接住你？
text.en: How do you want me to catch you at your most fragile?

text.zh: 你愿意把哪个秘密交给我保管？
text.en: Which secret would you entrust to me?

text.zh: 你觉得我们的爱最像什么——光、火、水，还是别的？
text.en: What is our love most like - light, fire, water, or something else?

text.zh: 如果有一天你发现我做了违背你底线的事，你会先听我说还是先离开？
text.en: If I crossed your bottom line, would you listen first or leave first?

text.zh: 你愿意为我们的关系，改变自己最深的信念吗？
text.en: Would you change your deepest belief for us?

text.zh: 你觉得“原谅”的边界在哪里？
text.en: Where do you draw the line of "forgiveness"?

text.zh: 你怎么看待我们之间无法调和的差异？
text.en: How do you view the irreconcilable differences between us?

text.zh: 你希望我们在对方面前，能诚实地丑陋到什么程度？
text.en: How honestly ugly do you hope we can be with each other?

text.zh: 你认为爱里最重要的“承诺”是什么？
text.en: What's the most important "promise" in love?

text.zh: 如果我们的信仰不同，你希望如何共同生活？
text.en: If our beliefs differ, how would you want to live together?

text.zh: 你最害怕我看见的、自己的一部分是什么？
text.en: What part of yourself do you most fear me seeing?

text.zh: 你希望我如何提醒你，当你正在远离自己？
text.en: How do you want me to remind you when you're drifting from yourself?

text.zh: 你愿意和我一起面对你内心最深的恐惧吗？
text.en: Will you face your deepest fear with me?

text.zh: 你觉得我们之间的爱，有没有让你变得更勇敢？
text.en: Has our love made you braver?

text.zh: 你希望我们如何在彼此跌倒时接住对方？
text.en: How do you hope we catch each other when we fall?

text.zh: 你有没有一个一直在逃避的问题，想和我一起直面？
text.en: Is there a question you've been avoiding, that you'd face with me?

text.zh: 你希望我们十年后回看今天，会感谢现在的彼此什么？
text.en: Looking back ten years from now, what do you hope we'll thank each other for?

text.zh: 如果我们的灵魂有一种颜色，会是什么？为什么？
text.en: If our souls had a color, what would it be, and why?

text.zh: 你想和我一起在某个瞬间“消失”一次吗？去哪里？
text.en: Would you want to "disappear" with me for a moment? Where to?

text.zh: 如果来世还能相遇，你希望我们以什么身份重逢？
text.en: If we could meet again in another life, as what would you want us to reunite?

text.zh: 你觉得宇宙为什么让我们相遇？
text.en: Why do you think the universe brought us together?

text.zh: 如果可以共享一个梦境，你最想和我梦到什么？
text.en: If we could share a dream, what would you most want to dream with me?

text.zh: 你希望我们的故事被写成什么样的一句话？
text.en: How would you want our story summarized in one line?

text.zh: 你愿意和我一起做一件“毫无意义却很美”的事吗？是什么？
text.en: Would you do something "meaningless but beautiful" with me? What?

text.zh: 如果不说话，你想用一个动作告诉我“我在”，会是什么？
text.en: Without words, what gesture would you use to say "I'm here"?

text.zh: 你希望我们之间，多一句怎样的晚安？
text.en: What kind of goodnight do you wish we had more of?

text.zh: 如果有一天我忘了你，你最希望我记得的最后一件事是什么？
text.en: If one day I forgot you, what's the last thing you'd want me to remember?

text.zh: 你希望我们明年的今天，一起做一件什么事？
text.en: What do you hope we'll do together on this day next year?

text.zh: 我们之间，你愿意永远重复的一瞬间是哪个？
text.en: Which moment between us would you happily relive forever?

text.zh: 你觉得“家”对你来说，首先意味着什么？
text.en: What does "home" mean to you, first of all?

text.zh: 你希望我记住你哪一种样子，即使它不完美？
text.en: Which version of you do you hope I remember, even if imperfect?

text.zh: 你希望我如何记得你，如果你先我而去？
text.en: How would you want me to remember you, if you go before me?

text.zh: 如果只能留一道菜陪我吃一辈子，你选什么？
text.en: If you could keep only one dish to share with me for life, what would it be?

text.zh: 你想和我一起养一只什么？它叫什么名字？
text.en: What would you want us to raise together, and what would we name it?

text.zh: 你有没有一个从没说出口的“对不起”想对我说？
text.en: Is there an unspoken "sorry" you've wanted to say to me?

text.zh: 你最近一次真心笑，是因为什么？
text.en: What made you genuinely laugh recently?

text.zh: 你希望我们如何对待彼此的坏情绪？
text.en: How do you hope we treat each other's bad moods?

text.zh: 你愿意和我分享你最不光彩的一面吗？
text.en: Would you share your least honorable side with me?

text.zh: 你第一次觉得“我想和这个人一直走下去”是哪一刻？
text.en: When did you first think "I want to go on with this person"?

text.zh: 你希望我们的家有一扇怎样的窗？窗外是什么？
text.en: What kind of window would you want in our home, and what's outside it?

text.zh: 你希望我成为你变成更好的自己的见证者吗？
text.en: Do you want me to witness you becoming a better self?

text.zh: 你最喜欢我们之间哪个距离——并肩、面对面，还是背靠背？
text.en: Which distance between us do you like most - side by side, face to face, or back to back?

text.zh: 你想让我为你写一封怎样的信？
text.en: What kind of letter would you want me to write for you?

text.zh: 如果我们的爱有一个终点，你希望它通向哪里？
text.en: If our love had a destination, where would you want it to lead?

text.zh: 如果我们是一本童话书里的两个角色，会是谁？
text.en: If we were two characters in a fairy tale, who would we be?

text.zh: 你现在脑海里最先冒出的一句歌词是什么？
text.en: What's your favorite song lyric you can think of off the top of your head?

text.zh: 你为什么期待别人用你爱他们的方式来爱你？
text.en: Why do you expect other people to love you like you do?

text.zh: 你对别人抱有的哪种期待，最让你受伤？
text.en: What expectation have you had for other people that has been hurting you the most?

text.zh: 你如何治愈那些你不允许自己感受的东西？
text.en: How can you heal what you don't let yourself feel?

text.zh: 你觉得我们为什么会相遇？
text.en: Why do you think we met?
I know I'm in love when _____________.

text.zh: 你是如何走出你的初恋的？
text.en: How did you get over your first love?

text.zh: 你是不是在逃避和自己的一场艰难对话？
text.en: Are you avoiding hard conversations with yourself?

text.zh: 你有没有在某件事上对自己撒谎？
text.en: Are you lying to yourself about anything?

text.zh: 前任教给你的最好的一课是什么？
text.en: What's the best lesson an ex has ever taught you?

text.zh: 有没有人改变了你的人生，而他自己却不知道？
text.en: Is there anyone who's changed your life but doesn't know it?

text.zh: 此刻你比任何事都更需要的是什么？
text.en: What do you need right now, more than anything?

text.zh: 你上一次觉得做你真幸运是什么时候？
text.en: When was the last time you felt lucky to be you?

text.zh: 今天你需要接纳什么？
text.en: What do you need to accept today?

text.zh: 你上一次感到最像自己是什么时候？
text.en: When was the last time you felt most yourself?

text.zh: 今天你可以在哪件事上对自己更温柔一点？
text.en: What can you be kinder towards yourself for today?

text.zh: 你觉得我的超能力是什么？
text.en: What do you think my superpower is?

text.zh: 你妈妈叫什么名字？她至今教给你最珍贵的一课是什么？
text.en: What's your mother's name and the most valuable lesson she's taught you thus far?

text.zh: 此刻你最感激的是什么？
text.en: What are you most grateful for in this current moment?

text.zh: 你还在试图向自己证明什么？
text.en: What are you still trying to prove to yourself?

text.zh: 最近你把什么当作理所当然了？
text.en: What have you been taking for granted lately?

text.zh: 有没有一种你已经不再拥有、却很想念的感觉？
text.en: Is there a feeling you miss?

text.zh: 你年轻的自己绝不会相信你现在生活的哪一点？
text.en: What would your younger self not believe about your life today?

text.zh: 万能牌：承认一件事。
text.en: WILDCARD: admit something.

text.zh: 你对我的第一印象是什么？
text.en: What was your first impression of me?

text.zh: 如果能如愿，你会和谁在一起？在哪里？在做什么？
text.en: If you could have it your way, who would you be with? Where would you be? And what would you be doing?

text.zh: 你最近，还好吗？说真的。
text.en: How are you, really?

text.zh: 你会给人生的这一章起什么标题？
text.en: What title would you give this chapter in your life?

text.zh: 别人对你做过的最糟糕的误解是什么？
text.en: What is the worst assumption someone has made about you?

text.zh: 我身上有什么让你觉得最陌生、最不了解？
text.en: What about me is most strange or unfamiliar to you?

text.zh: 你上一次对妈妈撒的谎是什么？
text.en: What's the last thing you lied to your mom about?

text.zh: 你最具决定性的特质是什么？
text.en: What is your defining characteristic?

text.zh: 你爸爸叫什么名字？说一件关于他的事。
text.en: What's your father's name and one thing about him?

text.zh: 我们可以一起创造些什么？
text.en: What can we create together?

text.zh: 用一个词形容我们之间的对话。
text.en: In a word, how would you describe our conversation?

text.zh: 我让你想起谁？
text.en: Who do I remind you of?

text.zh: 你最近对什么说了不，让你感到骄傲？
text.en: What have you said no to recently that made you proud?

text.zh: 你的哪种不安全感最拖累你？
text.en: What insecurity of yours holds you back the most?

text.zh: 你经历过最痛的、非身体上的痛是什么？
text.en: What's the most pain you've ever been in that wasn't physical?

text.zh: 哪一课你花了最久才学会放下？
text.en: What lesson took you the longest to unlearn?

text.zh: 你有没有哪种不安全感，正在无意中伤害着别人？
text.en: Are any of your insecurities hurting someone else by accident?

text.zh: 亲爱的抚养我长大的人，谢谢你____________。
text.en: Dear people who raised me, thank you for ________.

text.zh: 最近是什么让你保持清醒与平静？
text.en: What's been keeping you sane lately?

text.zh: 你现在在想念谁吗？你觉得他们也在想你吗？
text.en: Are you missing anyone right now? Do you think they are missing you too?

text.zh: 用一个词形容恋爱的感觉。
text.en: How would you describe the feeling of being in love in one word?

text.zh: 在我人生的这一章里，我怎样才能陪在你身边？
text.en: How can I be there for you during this chapter?

text.zh: 如果你为我做一张歌单，会有哪三首歌？
text.en: If you made a playlist for me, what 3 songs would be on it?

text.zh: 我一有空就必须去看的是什么？
text.en: What do I need to watch as soon as I have the time?

text.zh: 万能牌：最近谁一直萦绕在你心头？给他们发条信息，告诉他们你在想他们。双方都做。
text.en: WILDCARD: who's been on your mind lately? Send them a text letting them know you're thinking of them. Both players.

text.zh: 过去几周教会了你什么？
text.en: What have the past few weeks taught you?

text.zh: 万能牌：打给你一个敬佩的人，告诉他们你为什么欣赏他们。
text.en: WILDCARD: call someone you admire. Let them know why you appreciate them.

text.zh: 你过去容忍过别人的什么，现在已经没有空间再接受了？
text.en: What have you tolerated from people in the past that you no longer have space for?

text.zh: 这周让我笑了一件事是____________。
text.en: Something that brought a smile to my face this week was __________.

text.zh: 你觉得我最具决定性的特质是什么？
text.en: What do you think my defining characteristic is?

text.zh: 你最近有没有改变对某件事的看法？
text.en: Have you changed your mind about anything recently?

text.zh: 我身上哪一点对你来说最难理解？
text.en: What about me is hardest for you to understand?

text.zh: 你最欣赏我什么？
text.en: What do you admire most about me?

text.zh: 你觉得我在学校受欢迎吗？说说理由。
text.en: Do you think I was popular in school? Explain.

text.zh: 你最近感受到最多的情绪是什么？
text.en: What are you feeling a lot of lately?

text.zh: 你经历过最无法解释的事是什么？
text.en: What's the most unexplainable thing that's ever happened to you?

text.zh: 你现在需要什么，却没有说出口？
text.en: What do you need right now but aren't communicating?

text.zh: 过去一年你不得不面对的最难的真相是什么？
text.en: What's the hardest truth you had to face this past year?

text.zh: 有什么感受你不太愿意和我分享？
text.en: What's a feeling you're uncomfortable sharing with me?

text.zh: 万能牌：唱出你脑海里最先想到的歌词。双方都做。
text.en: WILDCARD: sing your favorite song lyrics you can think of off the top of your head. Both players.

text.zh: 你正在独自熬过什么，是别人看不见的？
text.en: What are you currently working through that others can't see?

text.zh: 你的心在告诉你什么？
text.en: What is your heart telling you?

text.zh: 你感情生活里最大的转折点是什么？
text.en: What was the biggest turning point in your dating life?

text.zh: 你能承认的自己最有毒的特质是什么？
text.en: What is your most toxic trait you can admit to?

text.zh: 你生命里谁最值得一句谢谢？如果可以，去告诉他们。
text.en: Who in your life deserves the biggest thank you? Let them know if you can.

text.zh: 你现在在想太多的是什么？
text.en: What are you overthinking right now?

text.zh: 你的上一段关系教会了你关于自己的什么？
text.en: What did your last relationship teach you about yourself?

text.zh: 你身上哪种自我信念已经不再服务于你了？
text.en: What belief about yourself no longer serves you?

text.zh: 你觉得我曾经真的爱过吗？
text.en: Do you think I've ever been in love?

text.zh: 你觉得我曾经心碎过吗？
text.en: Do you think I've ever had my heart broken?

text.zh: 你觉得我会为了什么大出血买买买？
text.en: What do you think I'd splurge on?

text.zh: 你觉得我的专业是什么？
text.en: What do you think my major is?

text.zh: 你觉得我未来会做什么工作？
text.en: What do you think I'm going to do in the future (work/employment)?

text.zh: 1到10分，你觉得我的车有多乱？
text.en: On a scale of 1 - 10, how messy do you think my car is?

text.zh: 你觉得我喜欢吃辣条吗？
text.en: Do you think I like hot cheetos?

text.zh: 你觉得我喜欢阅读吗？
text.en: Do you think I like to read?

text.zh: 你觉得我有兄弟姐妹吗？大的还是小的？
text.en: Do you think I have a sibling? Older or younger?

text.zh: 你觉得我最喜欢的歌手是谁？
text.en: Who do you think is my favorite artist?

text.zh: 你觉得我在哪儿长大？
text.en: Where do you think I grew up?

text.zh: 你觉得我最喜欢的咖啡店饮品是什么？
text.en: What do you think my favorite Starbucks drink is?

text.zh: 你最不喜欢一个人身上的哪种性格特质？
text.en: What is your least favorite personality trait in a person?

text.zh: 父母身上哪一种性格特质你想保留，哪一种想放下？
text.en: Which one of your parent's personality traits do you want to keep/let go of?

text.zh: 你会对年轻的自己说什么？你又从中学到了什么？
text.en: What would you tell your younger self and what have you learned from this lesson?

text.zh: 用一种非家养动物形容你自己，为什么？
text.en: What non-domestic animal describes you and why?

text.zh: 你最喜欢被用哪个形容词形容？
text.en: What is your favorite adjective with which to be described?

text.zh: 你上一次哭是什么时候？
text.en: When is the last time you cried?

text.zh: 如果能给孩子植入一种性格特质，你会选什么？
text.en: If you could instill one personality trait in your child, what would it be?

text.zh: 和你谈恋爱最难的部分是什么？
text.en: What's the hardest part about dating you?

text.zh: 想一个你敬佩的人。是什么让你想到了他们？
text.en: Think of someone that you admire. What made you think about them specifically?

text.zh: 你犯过最大的错误是什么？
text.en: What's the biggest mistake you've made?

text.zh: 你有一句常说的口头禅，希望自己能不再说？是什么？
text.en: What's a phrase that you say that you wish you would stop saying?

text.zh: 基于你对我的了解，你会推荐我读什么？
text.en: Based on what you learned about me, what would you recommend I read?

text.zh: 我身上有什么让你惊讶的？
text.en: What about me surprised you?

text.zh: 基于你对我的了解，有推荐的剧给我看吗？
text.en: Based on what you know about me, do you have a Netflix recommendation?

text.zh: 你觉得我们之间最重要的相似之处是什么？
text.en: What do you think our most important similarities are?

text.zh: 你觉得我做哪一件事，能让我的人生彻底变好？
text.en: What do you think is one thing I could do that would drastically improve my life?

text.zh: 对我来说，完美的礼物是什么？
text.en: What would be the perfect gift for me?

text.zh: 你会怎么向一个陌生人描述我？
text.en: How would you describe me to a stranger?

text.zh: 我现在最需要听到的是什么？
text.en: What do I need to hear right now?

text.zh: 基于你对我的了解，我的社交媒体能真实代表我吗？
text.en: Based on what you've learned about me, does my social media portray me accurately?

text.zh: 你从我们的对话里会带走怎样一课？
text.en: What is a lesson you will take away from our conversation?

text.zh: 我能帮到你什么？
text.en: What can I help you with?

text.zh: 你觉得我最害怕的是什么？
text.en: What do you think I fear the most?

text.zh: 在什么领域我最有资格给别人建议？
text.en: Where am I most qualified to give advice about?

text.zh: 如果我们是一个乐队，我们会叫什么名字？
text.en: If we were a band, what would be our name?

text.zh: 你在我身上看到了自己的哪些部分？
text.en: What parts of yourself do you see in me?

text.zh: 一个人要怎样才能赢得你的脆弱？
text.en: How does one earn your vulnerability?

text.zh: 挑战你的伴侣下周做一件走出舒适区的事。
text.en: Dare your partner to do something out of their comfort zone next week.

text.zh: 你觉得我应该放下什么？
text.en: What do you recommend I should let go of?

text.zh: 这场对话教会了你关于自己的什么？
text.en: What has this conversation taught you about yourself?

text.zh: 你最怕回答的是哪一道题？
text.en: What question were you most afraid to answer?

text.zh: 这场游戏结束后，你会记住我什么？
text.en: When this game is over, what will be something you will remember about me?

text.zh: 你觉得我的弱点是什么？
text.en: What do you think my weakness is?

text.zh: 我们的性格如何互补？
text.en: How do our personalities compliment each other?

text.zh: 你觉得我有什么应该知道、却自己没察觉的事？
text.en: What do you think I should know about myself that perhaps I'm unaware of?

text.zh: 什么会让你觉得和我更亲近？
text.en: What would make you feel closer to me?

text.zh: 我哪个回答让你眼睛亮了？
text.en: What answer of mine made you light up?

text.zh: 我身上最吸引你、但不是外在的是哪一点？
text.en: What's the most attractive quality about me that isn't physical?

text.zh: 你相信每个人都有天命吗？如果有，你觉得我找到了吗？
text.en: Do you believe everyone has a calling? If so, do you think I've found mine?

text.zh: 万能牌：基于你对彼此的了解，重写对方的交友软件简介。（30秒）
text.en: WILDCARD: Based on what you learned, re-write each other's dating app bios. (30 sec)

text.zh: 万能牌：一起画一幅画。（30秒）
text.en: WILDCARD: DRAW A PICTURE TOGETHER (30 SECS)

text.zh: 万能牌：对视30秒。你注意到了什么？
text.en: WILDCARD: LOOK INTO EACH OTHER'S EYES FOR 30 SECONDS. WHAT DID YOU NOTICE?

text.zh: 万能牌：给彼此写一段话交给对方，等离开后再打开。
text.en: WILDCARD: WRITE A MESSAGE TO EACH OTHER AND GIVE IT TO EACH OTHER. OPEN IT ONCE YOU HAVE LEFT.

text.zh: 万能牌：想一个你最爱的童年电视剧，倒数三声后一起喊出来。
text.en: WILDCARD: THINK OF YOUR FAVOURITE CHILDHOOD TV SHOW, ON THE COUNT OF THREE SAY IT OUT LOUD. (BOTH PLAYERS)

text.zh: 万能牌：一起拍张自拍。
text.en: WILDCARD: TAKE A SELFIE TOGETHER.

text.zh: 万能牌：对视不眨眼比赛。先眨眼的人要坦白一个烦恼，请对方给建议。
text.en: WILDCARD: STARING CONTEST. FIRST PERSON TO BLINK MUST REVEAL A PERSONAL PROBLEM AND ASK THE OTHER FOR ADVICE.

text.zh: 万能牌：自创一个问题，任何问题，让它有意义。
text.en: WILDCARD: CREATE YOUR OWN QUESTION. ANYTHING. MAKE IT COUNT.

text.zh: 万能牌：让对方闭上眼睛（等10秒），细致地描述你关于TA/你们最爱的回忆。
text.en: WILDCARD: TELL THE OTHER PERSON TO CLOSE THEIR EYES. (WAIT 10 SECONDS. DESCRIBE IN DETAIL YOUR FAVOURITE MEMORY OF THEM/TWO OF YOU)

text.zh: 万能牌：让对方闭上眼睛（等15秒），然后亲吻TA。
text.en: WILDCARD: TELL THE OTHER PERSON TO CLOSE THEIR EYES. (WAIT 15 SECONDS AND KISS THEM)

text.zh: 万能牌：随机播放你的音乐库，解释第一首出现的歌。
text.en: WILDCARD: PRESS SHUFFLE ON YOUR MUSIC LIBRARY. EXPLAIN THE FIRST SONG THAT COMES UP!

text.zh: 万能牌：放下你对结果的执念。
text.en: WILDCARD: LET GO OF YOUR ATTACHMENT TO THE OUTCOME.

text.zh: 万能牌：双方分享此刻最感激的一件事。
text.en: WILDCARD: BOTH PLAYERS SHARE SOMETHING YOU'RE MOST GRATEFUL FOR IN THIS CURRENT MOMENT.

text.zh: 万能牌：画出你现在的感受，然后对比。
text.en: WILDCARD: DRAW YOUR CURRENT FEELINGS THEN COMPARE.

text.zh: 万能牌：展示你相册里的第一张照片，解释一下。
text.en: WILDCARD: SHOW THE FIRST PHOTO IN YOUR CAMERA ROLL. EXPLAIN.

text.zh: 万能牌：想一件你讨厌、但大多数人不喜欢的事，倒数三声一起喊出来。
text.en: WILDCARD: THINK OF SOMETHING YOU DISLIKE THAT MOST PEOPLE DON'T. ON THE COUNT OF 3 SAY IT OUT LOUD.

text.zh: 万能牌：分享一个你最喜欢的回忆，对比彼此的。
text.en: WILDCARD: SHARE A FAVOURITE MEMORY OF YOURS. COMPARE. (BOTH)

text.zh: 我怎样才能让你的生活多1%的快乐？
text.en: HOW CAN I ADD 1% MORE HAPPINESS IN YOUR LIFE?

text.zh: 你欠自己一个原谅的是什么？
text.en: What do you need to forgive yourself for?

text.zh: 你怎么知道你坠入爱河了？
text.en: How do you know you're in love?

text.zh: 你怎么知道你在害怕一件事？
text.en: How do you know you're afraid of something?

text.zh: 为什么对我们来说，脆弱这么难？
text.en: Why is it so difficult for us to be vulnerable?

text.zh: 你生命里，跟谁在一起你能最脆弱？
text.en: Who in your life do you feel you can be most vulnerable with?

text.zh: 你上一次用自己的痛去帮别人，是什么时候？
text.en: When was the last time you used your pain to help someone else?

text.zh: 你为自己变成的这个人感到骄傲吗？
text.en: Are you proud of who you have become?

text.zh: 你是你曾经以为会成为的人吗？为什么？
text.en: Are you the person you thought you would become? Why or why not?

text.zh: 你觉得我谋生的工作里最难的部分是什么？
text.en: What do you think is the hardest part of what I do for a living?

text.zh: 你觉得我最可能一口气刷完哪种真人秀？说说理由。
text.en: What reality show do you think I'm most likely to binge watch? Explain.

text.zh: 你注意到的我的第一件事是什么？
text.en: What's the first thing you noticed about me?

text.zh: 如果还有Myspace，我的主页背景音乐会是什么？
text.en: If Myspace was still a thing, what would my profile song be?

text.zh: 如果只看外表什么都不知道，你会买什么礼物给我？
text.en: If you were to buy me a present, knowing nothing about me other than what I look like, what would it be?

text.zh: 你觉得植物在我手里会枝繁叶茂还是枯萎？说说理由。
text.en: Do you think plants thrive or die in my care? Explain.

text.zh: 我看起来像一个温柔的人吗？说说理由。
text.en: Do I look kind? Explain.

text.zh: 我更像创意型还是分析型？说说理由。
text.en: Do I seem like more of a creative or analytical type? Explain.

text.zh: 我像是会把别人的名字纹在身上的人吗？为什么？
text.en: Do I seem like someone who would get a name tattooed on myself? Why or why not?

text.zh: 完成这句话：只看外表，我会以为____________。
text.en: Finish the sentence: Just by looking at you I'd think _____________.

text.zh: 我的鞋透露了关于我的什么？
text.en: What do my shoes tell you about me?

text.zh: 你觉得我被解雇过吗？如果有，是因为什么？
text.en: Do you think I've ever been fired from a job? If so, what for?

text.zh: 你觉得我在交友软件上和现实里的第一印象有什么不同？
text.en: What was your first impression of me on Bumble vs IRL?

text.zh: 用三个词形容你觉得我的型是什么。
text.en: How would you describe what you think my type is in three words?

text.zh: 你对我发的第一条消息怎么看？
text.en: What did you think about my first message?

text.zh: 我们俩之间谁更像会发消息的那个？说说理由。
text.en: Between the two of us, who seems like the better texter? Explain.

text.zh: 我的Instagram告诉了你关于我的什么？
text.en: What does my Instagram tell you about me?

text.zh: 对我做一个假设。
text.en: Make an assumption about me.

text.zh: 我身上哪一点最让你着迷？
text.en: What about me intrigues you?

text.zh: 小时候你觉得我想成为什么？
text.en: As a child, what do you think I wanted to be?

text.zh: 你觉得我这辈子吃过多少张超速罚单？
text.en: How many speeding tickets do you think I've gotten in my life?

text.zh: 你觉得我容易坠入爱河吗？为什么？
text.en: Do you think I fall in love easily? Why or why not?

text.zh: 你觉得我最常听到的夸奖是什么？
text.en: What compliment do you think I hear the most?

text.zh: 你觉得我会查前任手机找证据吗？
text.en: Do you think I ever checked an ex's phone for evidence?

text.zh: 你觉得我学生时代最擅长哪门课？有挂过科吗？
text.en: What subject do you think I thrived at in school and did I fail any?

text.zh: 我像是喝咖啡还是喝茶的人？加糖还是不加？
text.en: Do I seem like a coffee or tea person - sweetened or unsweetened?

text.zh: 我像是早起型还是夜猫型？
text.en: Do I seem like a morning person or a night owl?

text.zh: 你觉得我赴约通常早到、准时还是迟到？说说理由。
text.en: Do you think I'm usually early, on time, or late to events? Explain.

text.zh: 我让你想起你认识的谁吗？
text.en: Do I remind you of anyone you know?

text.zh: 万能牌：用不同的口音问并回答下一题。
text.en: WILDCARD: Ask and answer the next question in a different accent.

text.zh: 万能牌：自创一个问题。
text.en: WILDCARD: Create your own question.

text.zh: 我是你通常会靠近的人吗？
text.en: Am I someone you typically connect with?

text.zh: 我让你有压迫感吗？为什么？
text.en: Do I intimidate you? Why or why not?

text.zh: 万能牌：写下你下个月最重要的目标，对比彼此。
text.en: WILDCARD: Write down your number one goal for the next month. Compare.

text.zh: 一开始是什么吸引你到我身边？时间久了又是什么让你留在我身边？
text.en: What immediately attracted you to me? What attracted you to me over time?

text.zh: 完成这句话：谢谢你接纳____________。
text.en: Finish the sentence: thank you for accepting _______.

text.zh: 你有没有把过去关系里的某种不安全感带到这段关系里？如果有，是什么？
text.en: Is there any insecurity from a previous relationship that you carried to this one? If so, what is it?

text.zh: 你身上最难被爱的是哪一点？
text.en: What about you do you find hardest to love?

text.zh: 万能牌：写一份如何爱你的伴侣的简短指南。30秒，对比。
text.en: Wildcard: Write a short guide of how to love your partner. 30 seconds, compare.

text.zh: 你为什么选择了我？又或者，我为什么选择了你？
text.en: Why did you choose me? Or why did I choose you?

text.zh: 你这周学到了关于自己的什么？
text.en: What is something you've learned about yourself this week?

text.zh: 有什么比被理解更浪漫？
text.en: What's more romantic than being understood?

text.zh: 当你选择某样东西时，它也同时在选择你的是什么？
text.en: What are you choosing that's also choosing you?

text.zh: 你喜欢那些选择了你的人的什么？
text.en: What do you like about those who chose you?

text.zh: 如果你们之间没有身体的吸引，你还会和这个人做朋友吗？
text.en: Would you be friends with this person if you weren't physically attracted to them?

text.zh: 如果对方对你没有身体上的吸引，你还会和TA做朋友吗？
text.en: Would you be friends with this person if they weren't physically attracted to you?

text.zh: 对方有什么反复出现的行为让你烦？你期望TA如何改变？
text.en: What's a repeated behavior from the other person that you find annoying? How do you expect them to change?

text.zh: 你是否把爱情当成了生活的中心？还有别的领域让你爱自己吗？
text.en: Are you making your love life the center of your life? Is there any other area that makes you love yourself?

text.zh: 万能牌：写下你最重要的两个恋爱底线，对比。
text.en: Wildcard: Write down your top two relationship deal breakers. Compare.

text.zh: 万能牌：问任何事，允许深入。
text.en: Wild card: Ask literally anything, permission to go there.

text.zh: 万能牌：分享一件你不会在第一次约会分享的事。双方都做。
text.en: Wild card: Share something you wouldn't share on a first date. Both players.

text.zh: 你现在的情感可及度有多少？说说看。
text.en: How emotionally available are you right now? Explain.

text.zh: 你爱和他们在一起时的自己吗？
text.en: Did you love who you are when you're with them?

text.zh: 你爱我身上非外在的什么？
text.en: Do you love me for anything that's not physical?

text.zh: 你选了又改变了主意的领域是什么？
text.en: What is a great area that you picked but then changed your mind?

text.zh: 你的底线是什么？它们还是你原来想要的那些底线吗？
text.en: What are the deal breakers, are they still the same deal breakers you wanted?

text.zh: 你有没有承认过自己错了？你是怎么道歉的？
text.en: Have you ever admitted you're wrong? How did you say sorry?

text.zh: 你伤害别人后，他们的反应是什么？
text.en: How did people react after you wronged them?

text.zh: 你对我做了假设，还是问了我问题？
text.en: Did you make assumptions or ask questions about me?

text.zh: 我听到别人的想法时做了什么？是嘲笑还是关闭对话？
text.en: What did I do when I heard ideas and opinions from other people? Did I mock them or shut down?

text.zh: 我们的强项和弱点如何互补？
text.en: How do our strengths and weaknesses complement each other?

text.zh: 这场对话教会了我关于我们的什么？又教会了我关于自己的什么？
text.en: What did this conversation teach me about our relationship? What does it teach me about myself?

text.zh: 你会一直在吗？
text.en: Are you gonna be here for me?

text.zh: 你上一次不得不接受损失、放手是什么时候？
text.en: When was the last time you had to accept your loss and let it go?

text.zh: 如果我失去你，我会怎样？
text.en: What will happen to me if I lose you?

text.zh: 你最近是在为自己和自己的兴趣努力，还是在为别人努力？
text.en: Have you been working on yourself and your self-interests lately? Or have you been working on others?

text.zh: 你觉得认识自己，会让别人的看法变得不那么重要吗？
text.en: Do you think knowing who you are makes others' opinions hold less weight?

text.zh: 有什么事你确信自己绝不会做，却暗暗希望自己有胆量去做？
text.en: What is something you are sure you would never do but secretly wish you had the guts to?

text.zh: 你看到自己和身边的人结婚吗？
text.en: Do you see yourself marrying the person you're with?

text.zh: 你什么时候觉得最活着？
text.en: When do you feel most alive?

text.zh: 你认识的最坚强的人是谁？你希望自己怎样更像TA？
text.en: Who is the strongest person you know and how do you wish you were more like them?

text.zh: 你做过最好的一个错误是什么？为什么？
text.en: What is the best mistake you have ever made and why?

text.zh: 如果有人想轻易惹恼你，TA需要做什么？
text.en: If someone wanted to annoy you easily, what would they have to do?

text.zh: 如果你是一个土豆，你希望被怎么做着吃？
text.en: If you were a potato, how would you want to be cooked?

text.zh: 你6岁的时候，想长大做什么？
text.en: When you were 6, what did you want to be when you grew up?

text.zh: 你假装讨厌、其实偷偷喜欢（罪恶快感）的是什么？
text.en: What do you pretend to hate but secretly love (guilty pleasure)?

text.zh: 你最重要的物品是什么？
text.en: What's your most important possession?

text.zh: 关于你，有什么是你觉得伴侣应该知道的？
text.en: What's something about you that you think your partner should know?

text.zh: 做动作片里的角色，还是喜剧里的角色？
text.en: Be a character in an action movie or a comedy?

text.zh: 你做过最尴尬的事是什么？
text.en: What's the most embarrassing thing you've ever done?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的气味是什么？
text.en: Favorite scent?

text.zh: 如果必须唱卡拉OK，你会选哪首歌？
text.en: If you had to sing karaoke, what song do you pick?

text.zh: 最后一个看到你哭的人是谁？
text.en: Last person to see you cry?

text.zh: 你相信 opposites attract（互补相吸），还是更喜欢和自己相似的人？
text.en: Do you believe opposites attract or do you prefer someone who is more like you?

text.zh: 此刻你有什么事需要建议？
text.en: What is something you need advice on right now?

text.zh: 你花最多时间想的是什么？为什么？
text.en: What do you spend the most time thinking about and why?

text.zh: 一开始是什么吸引了你到我身边？
text.en: What first attracted you to me?

text.zh: 我还是你刚认识时的那个人吗？
text.en: Am I still the same person that I was when you met me?

text.zh: 我有没有以一种你不喜欢的方式改变？
text.en: Have I changed in a way that you don't like?

text.zh: 你想去哪里度蜜月？
text.en: Where would you want to spend a honeymoon?

text.zh: 谁或什么让你眼里有光？
text.en: Who or what lights you up?

text.zh: 早上洗澡还是晚上洗澡？
text.en: Shower in the morning or at night?

text.zh: 如果现在可以许3个关于我们关系的愿望，你会许哪3个？
text.en: If you got 3 wishes right now for our relationship, what would be your 3 wishes?

text.zh: 和金刚打，还是和霸王龙打？
text.en: Rather fight King Kong or T. rex?

text.zh: 做世上最有趣的人，还是最有魅力的人？
text.en: Rather be the funniest person alive or the most attractive?

text.zh: 如果知道自己只剩一天，你会做什么？
text.en: If you knew you had one day left on this earth, what would you do?

text.zh: 你宁愿无法说谎，还是无法说话？
text.en: Would you rather be unable to lie or unable to speak?

text.zh: 你最欣赏伴侣什么？
text.en: What do you admire the most about your partner?

text.zh: 什么会让你不再爱一个人？
text.en: What makes you fall out of love?

text.zh: 你希望我们多久亲热一次？
text.en: How often would you like us to have sex?

text.zh: 我怎样才能成为你更好的伴侣？
text.en: How can I be a better partner to you?

text.zh: 有没有什么我们曾经做过、现在很想念的事？
text.en: Is there something you miss that we used to do?

text.zh: 你什么时候觉得和我最亲近？
text.en: When do you feel closest to me?

text.zh: 你最喜欢我外表的哪个特征？
text.en: What feature do you find most attractive about me physically?

text.zh: 我身上有什么让你觉得烦？
text.en: What is something about me that annoys you?

text.zh: 你觉得自己足够自在，能和我敞开聊任何事吗？
text.en: Do you feel comfortable enough to open up and talk to me about anything?

text.zh: 如果必须选，你觉得你给我的，是多于我应得的，还是少于我应得的？
text.en: If you had to pick, do you feel you give me more than I deserve or less than I deserve?

text.zh: 你会对我们感到厌倦吗？
text.en: Do you ever get bored with us?

text.zh: 如果我给你一张“自由通行证”，你会接受吗？
text.en: If I were to give you a free pass, would you take it?

text.zh: 在恋爱里，我帮到了你什么？
text.en: What's something I help you with when it comes to being in a relationship?

text.zh: 如果我教过你什么，我教了你什么？
text.en: If I've taught you anything, what have I taught you?

text.zh: 你觉得“爱”这个字什么时候该用？它有多重要？
text.en: When do you feel the L word should be used and how important is it?

text.zh: 什么动物让你想起我？
text.en: What animal reminds you of me?

text.zh: 哪种爱的语言最能让你感到被我爱着？
text.en: What love language makes you feel loved the most by me?

text.zh: 对于我们这段关系，你的心态是什么？
text.en: What is your mindset when it comes to our relationship?

text.zh: 我说的哪句话一直留在你心里？（说多少句都可以）
text.en: What is something I've said that has stuck with you? (name as many as wanted)

text.zh: 你上一次想到我们分手是什么时候？
text.en: When is the last time the thought of us breaking up occurred to you?

text.zh: 你觉得我们是命中注定吗？
text.en: Do you think we're meant to be?

text.zh: 如果能在全世界任选一个人共进晚餐，你会选谁？
text.en: Given the choice of anyone in the world, whom would you want as a dinner guest?

text.zh: 你想出名吗？想以什么方式出名？
text.en: Would you like to be famous? In what way?

text.zh: 打电话前，你会先预演要说的话吗？为什么？
text.en: Before making a telephone call, do you ever rehearse what you are going to say? Why?

text.zh: 对你来说，怎样才算“完美”的一天？
text.en: What would constitute a "perfect" day for you?

text.zh: 你上次唱歌给自己听是什么时候？唱给别人听呢？
text.en: When did you last sing to yourself? To someone else?

text.zh: 如果满足一个条件你就能活到90岁——要么保留30岁的身体，要么保留30岁的心智，你选哪个？
text.en: If you were able to live to the age of 90 and retain either the mind or body of a 30-year-old for the last 60 years of your life, which would you want?

text.zh: 你对自己将来的死，有怎样的预感？
text.en: Do you have a secret hunch about how you will die?

text.zh: 说出三件你和我有共同点的事。
text.en: Name three things you and your partner appear to have in common.

text.zh: 你生命中最感激的是什么？
text.en: For what in your life do you feel most grateful?

text.zh: 如果可以改变你被抚养长大的方式，你想改哪一点？
text.en: If you could change anything about the way you were raised, what would it be?

text.zh: 用4分钟时间，尽可能详细地向对方讲述你的人生故事。
text.en: Take four minutes and tell your partner your life story in as much detail as possible.

text.zh: 如果你明天一早醒来能拥有一项能力或特质，你希望是什么？
text.en: If you could wake up tomorrow having gained any one quality or ability, what would it be?

text.zh: 如果有一个水晶球能告诉你关于你自己、你的生活、未来或任何事的真相，你想知道什么？
text.en: If a crystal ball could tell you the truth about yourself, your life, the future or anything else, what would you want to know?

text.zh: 有没有一件你一直梦想去做的事？为什么还没做？
text.en: Is there something that you've dreamed of doing for a long time? Why haven't you done it?

text.zh: 你人生最大的成就是什么？
text.en: What is the greatest accomplishment of your life?

text.zh: 在友情里，你最看重什么？
text.en: What do you value most in a friendship?

text.zh: 你最珍视的回忆是什么？
text.en: What is your most treasured memory?

text.zh: 你最糟糕的回忆是什么？
text.en: What is your most terrible memory?

text.zh: 如果你知道自己一年内会突然死去，你会改变现在的生活方式吗？为什么？
text.en: If you knew that in one year you would die suddenly, would you change anything about the way you are now living? Why?

text.zh: 友情对你来说意味着什么？
text.en: What does friendship mean to you?

text.zh: 在你的生活中，爱和感情扮演着怎样的角色？
text.en: What roles do love and affection play in your life?

text.zh: 轮流分享你认为对方身上的5个优点。
text.en: Alternate sharing something you consider a positive characteristic of your partner. Share a total of five items.

text.zh: 你的家庭有多亲密、多温暖？你觉得童年比大多数人的更幸福吗？
text.en: How close and warm is your family? Do you feel your childhood was happier than most other people's?

text.zh: 你和你母亲的关系是怎样的？
text.en: How do you feel about your relationship with your mother?

text.zh: 各自说出“我们”这个词的3个真命题。比如“我们都在这个房间里感觉……”
text.en: Make three true "we" statements each. For instance, "We are both in this room feeling..."

text.zh: 完成这句话：“我希望我有一个能分享……的人”
text.en: Complete this sentence: "I wish I had someone with whom I could share..."

text.zh: 如果你要和对方成为密友，有什么最重要的事需要对方知道？
text.en: If you were going to become a close friend with your partner, please share what would be important for him or her to know.

text.zh: 你喜欢对方什么？要诚实，说你可能不会对刚认识的人说的话。
text.en: Tell your partner what you like about them; be very honest this time, saying things that you might not say to someone you've just met.

text.zh: 和对方分享一个尴尬的瞬间。
text.en: Share with your partner an embarrassing moment in your life.

text.zh: 你上次在别人面前哭是什么时候？自己一个人哭呢？
text.en: When did you last cry in front of another person? By yourself?

text.zh: 告诉对方，你已经喜欢上了TA的什么。
text.en: Tell your partner something that you like about them already.

text.zh: 有什么事是绝对不能开玩笑的？
text.en: What, if anything, is too serious to be joked about?

text.zh: 如果你今晚就会死去，离世前没有机会和任何人交流，你最遗憾没对谁说什么？为什么还没说？
text.en: If you were to die this evening with no opportunity to communicate with anyone, what would you most regret not having told someone? Why haven't you told them yet?

text.zh: 你所有的东西都着火了，救出亲人宠物后，你还有时间冲进去最后拿一件东西，你会拿什么？为什么？
text.en: Your house, containing everything you own, catches fire. After saving loved ones and pets, you have time to safely make a final dash to save any one item. What would it be? Why?

text.zh: 在家族里，谁离世最让你难以承受？为什么？
text.en: Of all the people in your family, whose death would you find most disturbing? Why?

text.zh: 分享一个你个人的难题，并请对方给出建议——TA会怎么处理。然后请对方复述，你觉得这个问题你怎么处理。
text.en: Share a personal problem and ask your partner's advice on how he or she might handle it. Also, ask your partner to reflect back to you how you seem to be feeling about the problem you have chosen.

text.zh: 你最喜欢的颜色是什么？为什么？
text.en: What is your favorite color? Why?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的食物是什么？最不喜欢的呢？
text.en: What is your favorite food? Your least favorite?

text.zh: 如果可以任意选一家餐厅吃晚餐，你会选哪种料理？
text.en: If you could pick any restaurant for dinner tonight, what type of cuisine would you choose?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的一部电影是什么？看过几遍？
text.en: What is your favorite movie? How many times have you seen it?

text.zh: 你最近在读什么书？或者最近一本让你印象深刻的书？
text.en: What are you reading now, or what's a book that left a strong impression on you recently?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的季节是哪个？为什么？
text.en: What is your favorite season? Why?

text.zh: 如果你有一种超能力，你希望是什么？
text.en: If you could have one superpower, what would it be?

text.zh: 你理想中的度假是什么样的？
text.en: What does your ideal vacation look like?

text.zh: 早上起床后你的第一个习惯是什么？
text.en: What is the first thing you do when you wake up in the morning?

text.zh: 睡前你最后一个习惯是什么？
text.en: What is the last thing you do before going to sleep at night?

text.zh: 目前你生活中最大的压力源是什么？
text.en: What is currently the biggest source of stress in your life?

text.zh: 你应对压力的方式是什么？我怎样能更好地支持你？
text.en: How do you cope with stress? How can I best support you?

text.zh: 你今年最重要的一个目标是什么？
text.en: What is your most important goal for this year?

text.zh: 你人生中最重要的长期目标是什么？
text.en: What is the most important long-term goal in your life?

text.zh: 你童年最快乐的记忆是什么？
text.en: What is your happiest childhood memory?

text.zh: 你童年最难过的一段经历是什么？
text.en: What was one of the most difficult experiences of your childhood?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的放松方式是什么？
text.en: What is your favorite way to relax?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的音乐类型或歌手是谁？为什么？
text.en: What is your favorite music genre or artist? Why?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的一种运动或锻炼方式是什么？
text.en: What is your favorite form of exercise or physical activity?

text.zh: 你最喜欢我为你做的哪件事？
text.en: What is your favorite thing I do for you?

text.zh: 在我们关系里，你最感激的一件事是什么？
text.en: What is one thing you are most grateful for in our relationship?

text.zh: 你希望我们每周一起做的一件事是什么？
text.en: What is one thing you wish we did together every week?

text.zh: 我做的哪件小事最让你觉得被爱？
text.en: What is one small thing I do that makes you feel most loved?

text.zh: 在你的一生中，你最大的恐惧是什么？
text.en: What is your greatest fear in life?

text.zh: 在我们关系里，你最大的恐惧是什么？
text.en: What is your greatest fear in our relationship?

text.zh: 你最想被记住的方式是什么？
text.en: How do you most want to be remembered?

text.zh: 你觉得自己的使命是什么？
text.en: What do you feel is your mission or purpose in life?

text.zh: 你最不希望别人知道的你的一面是什么？
text.en: What is the side of yourself you most wish others didn't see?

text.zh: 你希望自己更勇敢去做的一件事是什么？
text.en: What is one thing you wish you were more courageous about?

text.zh: 你心中我们之间最重要的传统或仪式是什么？
text.en: What is the most important tradition or ritual between us, in your heart?

text.zh: 你最希望我陪你一起面对的一个挑战是什么？
text.en: What is one challenge you most want me to face alongside you?

text.zh: 你最看重的三个价值观是什么？
text.en: What are the three values you hold most dear?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的一天中的时刻是什么？为什么？
text.en: What is your favorite time of day? Why?

text.zh: 你最理想的周末是什么样的？
text.en: What does your ideal weekend look like?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的动物是什么？
text.en: What is your favorite animal?

text.zh: 如果你能瞬间学会一项技能，你会选什么？
text.en: If you could instantly learn one skill, what would it be?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的甜点是什么？
text.en: What is your favorite dessert?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的气味是什么？为什么？
text.en: What is your favorite scent? Why?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的城市是哪里？为什么？
text.en: What is your favorite city? Why?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的节日是哪个？为什么？
text.en: What is your favorite holiday? Why?

text.zh: 你更喜欢早晨还是夜晚？为什么？
text.en: Are you more of a morning person or a night person? Why?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的童年玩具或游戏是什么？
text.en: What was your favorite childhood toy or game?

text.zh: 如果可以和任何历史人物共进晚餐，你选谁？
text.en: If you could have dinner with any historical figure, who would it be?

text.zh: 你最喜欢的天气是什么样的？
text.en: What is your favorite kind of weather?

text.zh: 你最想重温的一次旅行是哪次？
text.en: Which trip would you most want to relive?

description.zh: 轻松开场，慢慢靠近彼此
深入一些，让温度慢慢升起
description.en: Go a little deeper, let warmth rise
